title: Piel en Armonia | Medical dermatology in Quito
description: Medical dermatology in Quito with clear diagnosis, indicated treatment, and follow-up you can actually understand.

slides.title: A strong diagnosis at the start changes the whole course.
slides.description: We listen first, examine skin, hair, and nails, then shape a plan you can understand from the first consultation.

slides.title: Technology enters only when it improves the decision and the outcome.
slides.description: Laser, peels, and biostimulation are chosen by phototype, clinical objective, and follow-up safety, never by impulse.
slides.alt: Dermatology laser platform with medical settings

slides.title: Telemedicine to move early, without deciding blind.
slides.description: We resolve first guidance remotely and move into clinic in Quito when the case demands direct examination.

slides.title: Follow-up turns early improvement into real stability.
slides.description: Every review compares progression, adjusts recommendations, and keeps medical decisions traceable over time.
slides.alt: Integrated skin, hair, and nails follow-up

slides.title: A team that explains each decision without fog.
slides.description: You receive an up-to-date dermatology read, close guidance, and a plan that stays clear at every stage.

newsStrip.label: Start here
newsStrip.headline: Even with online booking paused, your first step does not have to wait.
newsStrip.detail: Start with telemedicine if you need early guidance, or open the service that feels closest to what is going on.

editorial.title: We explain what we see and what makes sense next.
editorial.deck: These entries show what we usually look at first, which decisions truly help, and how follow-up stays clear instead of overwhelming.

cards.title: From first consultation to a full plan
cards.copy: When skin changes in a recent way, we start by sorting findings and priorities so you leave with a plan that makes sense.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea with steady control
cards.copy: We control flares and sensitivity through timely adjustments based on how your skin is actually responding.
cards.alt: Medical care for acne and rosacea

cards.title: Laser with clear medical settings
cards.copy: Energy and frequency are set by phototype, lesion profile, and tolerance so skin stays protected throughout the process.

cards.title: Telemedicine when timing matters
cards.copy: You get early guidance without waiting longer than needed, and if an in-person exam matters, we coordinate the move into clinic.

cards.title: Pediatric care with clear guidance for families
cards.copy: We turn medical instructions into practical steps for home routines, school days, and caregiver follow-through.
cards.alt: Pediatric dermatology consultation with family support

cards.title: Follow-up that lets us see real progress
cards.copy: Symptoms, images, and tolerance are compared between visits so treatment can be adjusted with more precision.

corporateMatrix.title: A clearer way to choose where to begin
corporateMatrix.deck: Each service page explains when it usually helps, how care is approached, and when it may be worth looking at another option.

cards.title: Comprehensive diagnosis
cards.copy: A complete first read that puts priorities, risk, and follow-up timing on the table from the start.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea
cards.copy: Phase-based care to calm flares, ease sensitivity, and avoid unnecessary relapse.

cards.title: Dermatology laser
cards.copy: Laser is chosen by phototype, treatment goal, and skin response, with adjustments at every session.

cards.title: Early lesion assessment
cards.copy: Changing lesions are reviewed early so decisions happen on time and follow-up stays well documented.

cards.title: Telemedicine and clinic handoff
cards.copy: Remote guidance helps decide when follow-up at a distance is enough and when it is worth seeing you soon in Quito.

cards.title: Medical dermoaesthetics
cards.copy: Medical protocols for texture and firmness with realistic timelines and steady follow-up.

bookingStatus.title: Online booking under maintenance
bookingStatus.description: If you want to get moving today without calling first, start with telemedicine or open the service that sounds closest to what you are dealing with.
